message:
Ever wonder why your dog spins in three little circles before flopping down? 🐕💤

It's an instinct handed down from their wild ancestors. Long before comfy dog beds existed, dogs would circle to pat down tall grass, nudge away sticks and stones, and scan for anything lurking nearby — building the perfect, safe little nest before sleep.

Now your dog has a memory-foam bed in a climate-controlled living room… and still performs the ancient grass-stomping ritual every single night. 😅

It's a sweet reminder that under all that floof is a little wolf who just wants to feel safe before the snooze. Anyone else's pup do the full three-spin? 🐾
